title: hopea cernua
intro: Hopea cernua, also known as the drooping ironwood, is a species of tree in the family Dipterocarpaceae native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Hopea cernua include reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
